releases.notes: Trust/metadata hygiene: postinstall version now dynamic (was stale v1.5.2) + fixed docs link; /health uses canonical europe-west1 and only counts 2xx as healthy; tool-count drift root-caused via SoT+gate (audit now catches 'N MCP tools', asserts FULL_TOOL_COUNT); new no-legacy-region gate; slimmer tarball. No tool changes.
Reworked README product demo: 3-surface tour (Dashboard AI → Facturas split view → Analytics) with browser chrome, motion and crossfades. No tool changes.
README animated product demo (Dashboard → Facturas tour). No tool changes.

Pre-publish 10/10 hardening: corrected hero banner tool count, documented Kitchen/Restaurant tools, KSeF status corrected to honest infra-ready, canonical links, npm description shortened. Worker zod-alias fix (#84). No tool changes.
outputSchema coverage complete (160/160 schemas across 157 tools); honest OAuth consent-scope disclosure (#82).
List pagination fix ships to npm: every list_* tool now pages correctly via the API's `cursor` query param (was sending `after`); regression test pins the parameter name. No tool changes.
Docs/claims refresh: Track B pricing (Pro EUR 9 / Premium EUR 29), 139 countries with fiscal data, honest data-residency statement (EU-US DPF, Firestore nam5). No tool changes.

releases.delta: Envelope unwrap on all mutations + output-schema relax — invoices operable again
releases.notes: The Frihet API {data, meta} envelope is now unwrapped on single-object get_* reads and every mutation, so create/update/pay tools return the actual resource. Over-strict mutation output schemas relaxed (anti-envelope tripwire test guards the surface). verifactu_status returns honest not-submitted semantics on 404. OAuth key provisioning fixed against CF origin. Cursor marketplace manifest + ChatGPT submission kit refresh.

releases.delta: Trust hardening: Langfuse PII redaction + OpenAI output-schema strip + metadata single-source
releases.notes: Sensitive fields (taxId/NIF/CIF, IBAN, webhook secrets, auth tokens) are now redacted before Langfuse tracing in every profile mode; OpenAI-mode output schema no longer declares government IDs/credentials; OAuth logs fingerprint uid/email; Worker version + tool count now single-sourced from package.json so root/health/metadata surfaces can no longer drift apart.

releases.delta: Grouped tool-exposure mode + registry metadata refresh
releases.notes: Opt-in FRIHET_TOOL_MODE=grouped (progressive disclosure: list_tool_groups, search_tools, describe_tool) tames the 151-tool surface for agents; default unchanged. Registry/marketplace metadata corrected to 151 tools / 11 resources / 10 prompts. Anthropic DXT connector manifest added.

Promotes 1.12.0-beta.1 to npm latest. 151 tools / 11 resources / 10 prompts. Full ES/EU fiscal compliance: VeriFactu, TicketBAI, Facturae, FACe, PEPPOL, IGIC, Corporate Tax, GL Audit, HR, Payroll, Onboarding, Period Close, Gestoria.

Gestoria messaging/bulk/aging (5), Day-1 megasprint callables (audit GL, portal domain, IGIC, IS, VIES, bank rules), Day-4 e-invoicing (einvoice_export, face_submit/status, ticketbai_submit, ksef_submit stub), D4-B HR + Payroll + Onboarding + Permissions + Period close (19). ticketbai_status dedupe corrected count 152 to 151.
Wave Mature 1: Banking (5) + Fiscal (8) + Time (4) + Recurring (2) tool families. Trust Area gates on match_transaction_to_invoice, verifactu_resubmit, delete_time_entry. 4 new test files ~35 tests.
Wave 4/5: Stay (5 tools) + POS (4 tools). Vacation rental management and point-of-sale tools with Trust Area confirmation gate on refund_sale.
E-invoicing beta: send_einvoice, get_einvoice_status, validate_einvoice_xml, export_datev. CF endpoints rolling out.
